imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Wide panoramic tropical Hawaii landscape with volcano, ocean, lush greenery, and a vibrant sunset sky in coral and gold tones (hawaii-hero.dim_1440x600.png)
- Illustrated card thumbnail of the Big Island with lava fields and Mauna Kea (island-big-island.dim_600x400.png)
- Illustrated card thumbnail of Maui with the Road to Hana and green cliffs (island-maui.dim_600x400.png)
- Illustrated card thumbnail of Oahu with Waikiki beach and Diamond Head crater (island-oahu.dim_600x400.png)
- Illustrated card thumbnail of Kauai with the Na Pali Coast sea cliffs (island-kauai.dim_600x400.png)
- Illustrated card thumbnail of Molokai with tranquil coastline and white sand (island-molokai.dim_600x400.png)
- Illustrated card thumbnail of Lanai with rugged volcanic terrain and clear blue water (island-lanai.dim_600x400.png)

existing_features.title: Create a Hawaii travel guide app with sections for Islands (Big Island, Maui, Oahu, Kauai, Molokai, Lanai), each displaying key highlights, top attractions, beaches, and travel tips.

Apply a lush tropical visual theme inspired by Hawaii: warm sunset palette (coral, golden yellow, turquoise sea, deep green), bold serif headings, and full-bleed hero imagery. Use a card-based layout for island browsing and detail pages with immersive section dividers.
Render the generated hero banner and island illustration images from frontend/public/assets/generated as static assets throughout the app.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a backend that stores island data including name, description, top attractions (name + description), beaches, and travel tips, with query functions to retrieve all islands and individual island details.
